channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scream 7 Breaks A Major Franchise Rule (That Will Shape Its Sequel Story)
Michael B. Jordan And Ryan Coogler Have Become One Of Hollywood's Best Duos
41 Years Later, This '80s Sci-Fi Cult Classic Is Quietly Returning With a Brand-New Sequel
Renee Graziano Gives Update on Son AJ's Health After Sudden Hospitalization
item.description: Renee Graziano gave us an update on her son, AJ, after he was hospitalized for heart attack-like symptoms in late February ... and she shared her thou...

item.title: Sunny Hostin and Elisabeth Hasselbeck Spar Over Iran War on 'The View'
item.description: America, Israel and Iran aren't the only ones at war ... Sunny Hostin and Elisabeth Hasselbeck also waged a war of words over President Trump's latest...

item.title: 'Amazing Race' Contestants Sue CBS, Paramount for $8M, Allege Defamation
item.description: "The Amazing Race" contestants Jonathan and Ana Towns claim CBS and the show's producers besmirched their names on the reality TV competition show ......

item.title: Britney Spears Needs Another Conservatorship, Former 'Free Britney' Advocate Says
item.description: A former "Free Britney" enthusiast says she regrets publicly pushing to get Britney Spears out of her conservatorship ... Jessica -- the former advoca...

item.title: Cheek of the Week -- Guess Whose Stringy Bikini!
item.description: Thirsty Thursday comin' in HOT!!! Can you guess which Hollywood babe was catchin' rays with her bod on display!?! Check out the gallery -- You'll be B...
